purpose_context: Today's PR-landing pass surfaced recurring CI-infra friction (a brittle exact-LOC-equality census gate, a contract-conformance test that has been silently dead in CI, a masked contract violation it hid) and confirmed that SonarCloud's quality gate has been structurally unable to measure real progress (no version tracking, a coverage metric that measures a different scope than the internal gate). This mission fixes the structural bugs, then slices the live ~900-issue Sonar backlog into tracked, ticketed work by module/effort/impact, and fixes the slice that intersects the project's current active roadmap surface (the Wave 2 degod trio) rather than leaving debt to compound silently.
purpose_tldr: Fix the CI-topology census/contract test bugs found during today's PR landings, then structurally fix and selectively remediate SonarCloud quality-gate debt.
